V : Type u_1
P : Type u_2
inst✝⁴ : NormedAddCommGroup V
inst✝³ : InnerProductSpace ℝ V
inst✝² : MetricSpace P
inst✝¹ : NormedAddTorsor V P
inst✝ : Fact (finrank ℝ V = 2)
A B C A₁ B₁ C₁ A₂ B₂ C₂ : P
affineIndependent_ABC : AffineIndependent ℝ ![A, B, C]
equilateral_ABC : { points := ![A, B, C], independent := affineIndependent_ABC }.Equilateral
A₁_mem_interior_ABC : A₁ ∈ { points := ![A, B, C], independent := affineIndependent_ABC }.interior
B₁_mem_interior_ABC : B₁ ∈ { points := ![A, B, C], independent := affineIndependent_ABC }.interior
C₁_mem_interior_ABC : C₁ ∈ { points := ![A, B, C], independent := affineIndependent_ABC }.interior
BA₁_eq_A₁C : dist B A₁ = dist A₁ C
CB₁_eq_B₁A : dist C B₁ = dist B₁ A
AC₁_eq_C₁B : dist A C₁ = dist C₁ B
angle_BA₁C_add_angle_CB₁A_add_angle_AC₁B :
  EuclideanGeometry.angle B A₁ C + EuclideanGeometry.angle C B₁ A + EuclideanGeometry.angle A C₁ B = 8 / 3 * Real.pi
A₂_mem_inf_BC₁_CB₁ : A₂ ∈ affineSpan ℝ {B, C₁} ⊓ affineSpan ℝ {C, B₁}
B₂_mem_inf_CA₁_AC₁ : B₂ ∈ affineSpan ℝ {C, A₁} ⊓ affineSpan ℝ {A, C₁}
C₂_mem_inf_AB₁_BA₁ : C₂ ∈ affineSpan ℝ {A, B₁} ⊓ affineSpan ℝ {B, A₁}
affineIndependent_A₁B₁C₁ : AffineIndependent ℝ ![A₁, B₁, C₁]
scalene_A₁B₁C₁ : { points := ![A₁, B₁, C₁], independent := affineIndependent_A₁B₁C₁ }.Scalene
⊢ ∃ (affineIndependent_AA₁A₂ : AffineIndependent ℝ ![A, A₁, A₂]) (affineIndependent_BB₁B₂ :
    AffineIndependent ℝ ![B, B₁, B₂]) (affineIndependent_CC₁C₂ : AffineIndependent ℝ ![C, C₁, C₂]),
    2 ≤
      Cardinal.mk
        ↑(Metric.sphere { points := ![A, A₁, A₂], independent := affineIndependent_AA₁A₂ }.circumsphere.center

              Metric.sphere { points := ![B, B₁, B₂], independent := affineIndependent_BB₁B₂ }.circumsphere.center
                { points := ![B, B₁, B₂], independent := affineIndependent_BB₁B₂ }.circumsphere.radius ∩
            Metric.sphere { points := ![C, C₁, C₂], independent := affineIndependent_CC₁C₂ }.circumsphere.center
              { points := ![C, C₁, C₂], independent := affineIndependent_CC₁C₂ }.circumsphere.radius)
